title: Canvas Items, Tags, Layers, Rendering, and Redraw · Code Recall
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs canvas items, tags, layers, rendering, and redraw from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for tagged layered Canvas render plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish retained Canvas items, integer IDs, tags, configuration, coordinates, stacking order, and deletion.
Define wall, terrain, solution, focus, annotation, and status layers with stable stacking rules.
Use semantic tags for groups and stable model keys rather than retaining fragile positional ID lists.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Render Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review puzzle team handles case 1296 during a low-vision player session. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile retained render items, semantic tags, layer order, and redraw cleanup; resource use must remain below an explicit budget; then change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates.
